scripts.build: pnpm build-deps && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build-deps: pnpm --filter @massion/identity exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/subscriptions exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/runtime exec tsc -p tsconfig.json
